name: Create Master Undead
components: V, S, M; gemstone worth 500 gp per Hit Die (cost is direct)
target_area: One corpse suitable for the chosen undead form
duration: Instantaneous; control is ongoing until lost or superseded
rules_text: Creates a vampire, death knight, or lesser lich under the caster’s control. The material cost is a gemstone worth 500 gp per Hit Die of the created undead.
reconstruction_note: Effect and cost are directly transcribed. Unwritten fields follow create greater undead.
source_sections: Arcane 10 Spell Entries; Divine 10 Spell Entries

name: Epic Magic Missile
target_area: Up to 10 creatures; missiles can be divided among targets (reconstructed)
rules_text: Fires 10 magic missiles that are treated as maximized, empowered, and quickened. If a spell-resistance check fails, reroll the failed spell-penetration check; if the reroll also fails, the affected missile bounces to a new opponent.
reconstruction_note: Range, action, number of missiles, metamagic treatment, reroll, and bounce rule are direct. Other fields follow magic missile.

name: Summon Monster X
rules_text: Summons one CR 18 monster. The exact eligible creature list is not included in the handwritten pages.
reconstruction_note: The CR and quantity are direct; other fields follow the summon monster line.
source_sections: Arcane 10 Spell Entries; Divine 10 Spell Entries

name: Enchant Item
school: Not specified; likely transmutation or universal

name: Epic Particulate Form

rules_text: Functions as particulate form: targets gain fast healing (scaling as the base spell) and immunity to bleed damage, critical hits, sneak attacks, and other precision damage. The epic version greatly extends the duration.
reconstruction_note: The base spell fields and effect are standard PF1e. The extended durations are transcribed from the two epic lists.

name: Create Roaming Hungry Pit
saving_throw: Reflex avoids falling; Reflex half against crushing damage (reconstructed)
rules_text: Creates a hungry pit 10 feet deep per caster level, to a maximum depth of 300 feet. The pit has a 40-foot radius and can roam up to 80 feet when directed with a move action.
reconstruction_note: Range, radius, movement, depth, and maximum depth are direct. Other fields combine roaming pit and hungry pit.

name: Epic Finger of Death
saving_throw: The note says “save vs. death” for targets with HD no greater than caster level; a successful Will save reduces the result to 10d6 damage
rules_text: Against a target whose Hit Dice do not exceed the caster level, a failed death save kills the target. The note also states that the spell deals 10 damage per caster level with no maximum and allows a Will save for 10d6 damage. Because two save clauses are written, GM clarification is recommended.
reconstruction_note: All damage and save wording is directly transcribed; the interaction between the two saves is ambiguous.
